mapper.sql: id, user_id, balance, total_earned, total_spent, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM user_point_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_point_account (user_id, balance, total_earned, total_spent, created_at, updated_at, version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{balance}, #{totalEarned}, #{totalSpent}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{version})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_point_account SET balance = #{balance}, total_earned = #{totalEarned}, total_spent = #{totalSpent}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
